TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Tqilung, title = Tqilung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tqilung} }

S.FORM: = Tqilung/ Harung/ Harung = Beyhing bay qhuni mi msama ka harung nii, kika sqmusu qhuni na u msdrux balay, ckcka mtumun ka msdrux knrtan na, ccida qaraw na u mslau uri, niaqn so knrtan rupung ka ssiyaw wasw na, qtaan bay u niaqn 4 elu ddaun wluq qhuni, wa mdakil ddwiyaq Mtutu. Smkuxul mdakil mdngu dxral ka kluwan knuudus ckcka lmiqu hini ka hyaan uri, plalay criyu mdakil msunu dxral mi ini qpahan dxral. Cbiyaw han, ita sediq ngalan dha psmuun phiyu sapah, qqiya mi slmuun lbrak, niqan uri u pngalan na rhiq qhuni, srading mutung puniq, uxay uri u ddiyun dha rcuhan btasan dqras ka sqmaan qbulic na.
S.PHON: = tqiluŇč/ ńßa…ĺuŇč/ ńßa…ĺuŇč = b…ôńßiŇč baj qńßuni mi msama ka ńßa…ĺuŇč nii, kika sqmusu qńßuni na u msd…ĺux balaj, ¶k ¶ka mtumun ka msd…ĺux kn…ĺtan na, ¶ ¶ida qa…ĺaw na u mslau u…ĺi, niaqn so kn…ĺtan …ĺupuŇč ka ssijaw wasw na, qtaan baj u niaqn * …ôlu ddaun wluq qńßuni, wa mdakil ddwijaq mtutu. smkuxul mdakil mdŇču dx…ĺal ka kluwan knuudus ¶k ¶ka lmiqu ńßini ka ńßjaan u…ĺi, plalaj ¶…ĺiju mdakil msunu dx…ĺal mi ini qpańßan dx…ĺal. ¶bijaw ńßan, ita s…ôdiq Ňčalan dńßa psmuun pńßiju sapańß, qqija mi slmuun lb…ĺak, niqan u…ĺi u pŇčalan na …ĺńßiq qńßuni, s…ĺadiŇč mutuŇč puniq, uxaj u…ĺi u ddijun dńßa …ĺ ¶uńßan btasan dq…ĺas ka sqmaan qbuli ¶ na.
S.FORM: = Tqilung/ Harung/ Harung = Beyhing bay qhuni mi msama ka harung nii, kika sqmusu qhuni na u msdrux balay, ckcka mtumun ka msdrux knrtan na, ccida qaraw na u mslau uri, niaqn so knrtan rupung ka ssiyaw wasw na, qtaan bay u niaqn 4 elu ddaun wluq qhuni, wa mdakil ddwiyaq Mtutu. Smkuxul mdakil mdngu dxral ka kluwan knuudus ckcka lmiqu hini ka hyaan uri, plalay criyu mdakil msunu dxral mi ini qpahan dxral. Cbiyaw han, ita sediq ngalan dha psmuun phiyu sapah, qqiya mi slmuun lbrak, niqan uri u pngalan na rhiq qhuni, srading mutung puniq, uxay uri u ddiyun dha rcuhan btasan dqras ka sqmaan qbulic na.
S.PHON: = tqiluŇč/ ńßa…ĺuŇč/ ńßa…ĺuŇč = b…ôńßiŇč baj qńßuni mi msama ka ńßa…ĺuŇč nii, kika sqmusu qńßuni na u msd…ĺux balaj, ¶k ¶ka mtumun ka msd…ĺux kn…ĺtan na, ¶ ¶ida qa…ĺaw na u mslau u…ĺi, niaqn so kn…ĺtan …ĺupuŇč ka ssijaw wasw na, qtaan baj u niaqn * …ôlu ddaun wluq qńßuni, wa mdakil ddwijaq mtutu. smkuxul mdakil mdŇču dx…ĺal ka kluwan knuudus ¶k ¶ka lmiqu ńßini ka ńßjaan u…ĺi, plalaj ¶…ĺiju mdakil msunu dx…ĺal mi ini qpańßan dx…ĺal. ¶bijaw ńßan, ita s…ôdiq Ňčalan dńßa psmuun pńßiju sapańß, qqija mi slmuun lb…ĺak, niqan u…ĺi u pŇčalan na …ĺńßiq qńßuni, s…ĺadiŇč mutuŇč puniq, uxaj u…ĺi u ddijun dńßa …ĺ ¶uńßan btasan dq…ĺas ka sqmaan qbuli ¶ na.
